mapper.select:
SELECT t.* FROM eb_attendance_shift t
AND t.deleted_at IS NULL
AND ( t.id IN (SELECT shift_id FROM eb_attendance_group_shift WHERE group_id = #{query.groupFilterId}) OR t.id = 1 )
AND t.id > 1
AND ( t.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.nameLike}, '%') OR t.uid IN (SELECT id FROM eb_admin WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.nameLike}, '%')) )
ORDER BY t.sort ASC, t.created_at ASC, t.id ASC

SELECT t.* FROM eb_attendance_shift t
AND t.deleted_at IS NULL
AND ( t.id IN (SELECT shift_id FROM eb_attendance_group_shift WHERE group_id = #{query.groupFilterId}) OR t.id = 1 )
AND t.id > 1
AND ( t.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.nameLike}, '%') OR t.uid IN (SELECT id FROM eb_admin WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.nameLike}, '%')) )
ORDER BY t.sort ASC, t.created_at ASC, t.id ASC
